name: GLM
allowed_use_boundary: Use as external boundary-declaration crosswalk evidence.
Do not treat as certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority.
claims: GLM can declare claims, non-claims, scope, composition, and interpretation frame.
non_claims: GLM does not prove transition admissibility.
GLM does not grant execution authority.
GLM does not replace SPE standing determination.

transition_table_mapping.claims: machine-readable boundary, claim, non-claim, composition, and interpretation-frame declarations
transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no admissibility proof, execution authority, or SPE replacement
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: declared externally; not inherited by StegVerse
transition_table_mapping.evidence_model: source URL plus local wiki crosswalk
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: source plus crosswalk can reconstruct why the term relationship is bounded
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: pre-commit boundary evidence may inform standing review
transition_table_mapping.StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap: governance observatory and transition-table precondition mapping
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing source, undefined mapping, or authority overclaim

fail_closed_conditions: any certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority claim appears
